response: This implements the **Knuth-Morris-Pratt (KMP) string-matching algorithm**: it first builds the longest-proper-prefix-suffix (LPS) table for the pattern, then scans the text in O(n+m) time, using the LPS array to skip redundant comparisons after mismatches. It returns the starting index of the first occurrence of `pattern` in `text`, or -1 if not found.
